name: Use of Incorrect Byte Ordering
description: The product receives input from an upstream component but does not account for byte ordering (e.g., big-endian vs little-endian) when processing the input, causing an incorrect number or value to be used. This leads to integrity violations and unexpected state.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes (network data, file reads) containing multi-byte numeric values flowing to TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes without a TRANSFORM node (byte-order conversion/normalization) mediating the flow. The absence of endianness handling between cross-platform data exchange points indicates this weakness.
